title: Warrior
description: Your damage die is a d10, and choose one of the following tags to add to your natural weapons from **Fight Like a Beast**:

title: Hunter
description: Add one of the following to your list of **heritage moves**. This does not count towards your maximum number of **heritage moves**:

title: Counselor
description: You may be a Beast, but you're not uncivilized. When you **Parley**, you roll with WIS instead of CHA.

title: Nomad
description: You've travelled the wide world over. When you **arrive in a steading**, ask the GM about any important traditions, rituals, and so on, they'll tell you what you need to know.
